dependency.p25b_finding: Only 220/886 matches have both pregame+closing snapshots for valid CLV pairs

root_cause_detail.primary: CLOSING_SCHEDULE_NOT_DEFINED — wbc_backend/mlb_data/odds_capture_scheduler.determine_capture_windows() reads only data/mlb_context/odds_timeline.jsonl (MLB games). WBC/NPB game times from tsl_odds_history.jsonl are never checked. The closing window (0-5 minutes before game) never fires for WBC/NPB games.
root_cause_detail.secondary: CRAWLER_RUNTIME_NOT_TRIGGERED — The daemon (scripts/odds_capture_daemon.py) runs at 15-minute intervals in continuous mode but only activates closing/pregame/decision windows for MLB games. For WBC/NPB, it always runs in continuous mode regardless of game proximity.

proposed_fix.summary: Extend determine_capture_windows() to also read WBC/NPB game times from tsl_odds_history.jsonl (or a derived manifest). Add game-relative closing trigger: activate closing window when any WBC/NPB game is within PREGAME_LEAD_MINUTES of game_time.
proposed_fix.why_diagnostic_only: This is a live crawler change. Running it modifies tsl_odds_history.jsonl with new snapshots. Requires authorization before activating in production daemon.

next_steps: Authorize closing trigger extension in determine_capture_windows() for WBC/NPB games
Let daemon collect 2-3 weeks of WBC/NPB closing snapshots (game_time ±2h)
Rerun p25b bootstrap with expanded comparable pairs (~797 target)
If CLV still INCONCLUSIVE at n≥600: escalate to model quality investigation
